{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":347456,"duration_api_ms":143560,"num_turns":21,"result":"커밋 완료. lint-staged (eslint + prettier)도 통과했습니다.

**Phase 2 완료 요약:**

1. **Admin `useRealtimeSubscription`** (`hooks.ts:828-851`) — `contact:group-stage-advanced`와 `contact:split` 핸들러 추가. 구조적 변경이므로 `refetchQueries`(즉시 refetch) 사용, 타임라인 무효화 포함.

2. **Worker 대시보드** (`page.tsx:192-193`) — 동일 이벤트에 `debouncedFullInvalidate` 연결. 기존 패턴과 일관성 유지.

3. **AC 검증** — `tsc --noEmit` 통과. `pnpm build` 에러는 base branch에서도 동일하게 발생하는 기존 문제(누락된 페이지 모듈)로 이번 변경과 무관.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"3f56808b-3652-489e-bee7-60fffb2e9da4","total_cost_usd":0.924223,"usage":{"input_tokens":129,"cache_creation_input_tokens":60206,"cache_read_input_tokens":802181,"output_tokens":5848,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":60206,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":293,"cache_read_input_tokens":72467,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1130,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1130},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":129,"outputTokens":5848,"cacheReadInputTokens":802181,"cacheCreationInputTokens":60206,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.924223,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"44987ce6-dc8f-404b-b0ad-5730087b08da"}
